title: Boiling Point (2021)
summary: Described as emotionally draining even for viewers outside the restaurant industry. The one-take technique was praised, but what impressed the commenter most was how the film lingered in their mind for weeks. A piece of dialogue became a personal mantra.

summary: Briefly but enthusiastically recommended; one reply called it a "good choice."

summary: Recommended, though another commenter noted it may be older than ten years.

summary: Mentioned multiple times across the thread as a standout Indian thriller.

title: Silver Skates (2020)
summary: Described as visually beautiful, set in wintry St. Petersburg with people traveling across frozen canals on skates. Praised for its unique atmosphere.

title: Captain Volkonogov Escaped (2021)
summary: Described as showing the horrors of the Soviet state system with an effective mix of surrealism and drama; praised for still feeling relevant in modern Russia. Commenter shared a trailer link.

title: The Movie of My Life (2018)
summary: A boy returns to his small town seeking his absent French father; described as one of the most gorgeous-looking films the commenter has seen.

title: Carnival is Over (2024)
summary: A couple trying to leave a criminal family business find every decision pulls them deeper in, destroying their marriage.

title: The Clown's Daughter (2022)
summary: A daughter tries to reconnect with her gay father who performs as a drag queen clown; explores family rupture and reconciliation.

title: 45 do Segundo Tempo (2022)
summary: Three estranged friends reunite after 40 years when one plans to end his life after watching his team win a championship; described as reigniting their friendship.

title: The Flesh Itself (2025)
summary: Three soldiers desert during the Paraguayan War and encounter Lovecraftian horrors in an isolated house.
